indexes.expression: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_blueprints_system_code_unique ON public.blueprints USING btree (code) WHERE (((scope)::text = 'system'::text) AND (organization_id IS NULL))
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_blueprints_tenant_code_unique ON public.blueprints USING btree (organization_id, code) WHERE (organization_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_legal_deadline_due_pending ON public.legal_deadline USING btree (due_date, status) WHERE ((status)::text = 'pending'::text)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX notification_events_org_dedupe_uidx ON public.notification_events USING btree (organization_id, dedupe_key) WHERE (dedupe_key IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX organization_invitations_org_email_pending_uidx ON public.organization_invitations USING btree (organization_id, lower((email)::text)) WHERE ((status)::text = 'pending'::text)
CREATE INDEX idx_stage_instances_process_order ON public.stage_instances USING btree (process_track_id, "order")
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_calendar_ics_token_unique ON public.users USING btree (calendar_ics_token) WHERE (calendar_ics_token IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX whatsapp_messages_org_timestamp_idx ON public.whatsapp_messages USING btree (organization_id, "timestamp" DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_workflow_state_sinoe_keywords_gin ON public.workflow_states USING gin (sinoe_keywords) WHERE (sinoe_keywords IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX workflows_org_slug_unique ON public.workflows USING btree (organization_id, slug) WHERE (organization_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX workflows_slug_system_unique ON public.workflows USING btree (slug) WHERE (organization_id IS NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX workflows_system_action_type_unique ON public.workflows USING btree (action_type) WHERE ((is_system = true) AND (organization_id IS NULL) AND (action_type IS NOT NULL))
